requirement.title: REQ-1886
requirement.requirement: As soon as the component receives a response according to [PLGW-6832] it shall either confirm the successful reception to the TCU by sending a data packet specific `` .Status '' message with the Invalid_Parameter equal `` normal '' or when a negative response is received it shall send a data packet specific `` .Status message '' with the Invalid_Parameter equal `` out of range ''.
